---
title: "Resources"
---

## Learning Resources

### Problem Solving Techniques

- **[Polya's Problem Solving Method](polya.qmd)** - A systematic 4-step approach to solving mathematical problems
- [Original Polya PDF (Queen's University)](https://sass.queensu.ca/sites/sasswww/files/uploaded_files/Resource%20PDFs/polya.pdf)

### Textbooks & References

- **Linear Algebra**: Gilbert Strang's "Introduction to Linear Algebra"
- **Calculus**: Stewart's "Calculus: Early Transcendentals"
- **Abstract Algebra**: Dummit and Foote "Abstract Algebra"

### Online Platforms

- [Khan Academy Mathematics](https://www.khanacademy.org/math)
- [MIT OpenCourseWare](https://ocw.mit.edu/search/?d=Mathematics)
- [Paul's Online Math Notes](https://tutorial.math.lamar.edu/)

### Competition Resources

- [Canadian Mathematical Olympiad](https://www.cms.math.ca/competitions/)
- [Putnam Competition](https://maa.org/math-competitions/putnam-competition)
- [Project Euler](https://projecteuler.net/)
- **[Integration Bee Resources](integration_bee.qmd)** - Integration competition materials
  - [Practice Problems by Level](integration_practice.qmd) - warm-up to extreme, with techniques explained
  - [Bag of Tricks](integration_tricks.qmd) - the competition techniques catalogue with worked examples
  - [Integration Bee Instructions](files/Integration_Bee_instructions_2024.pdf)
  - [Integration Bee Questions](files/Integration_Bee_questions_2024.pdf)
  - [Integration Bee Solutions](files/Integration_Bee_qualifier_sols_updated.pdf)

### Study Groups

Join our study groups for:

- Real Analysis
- Abstract Algebra
- Combinatorics
- Numerical Analysis

## Organization Documents

### Governance & Guidelines

- [Society Constitution](files/MAMSoc_constitution.pdf)
- [WhatsApp Code of Conduct](files/Maths_Society_WhatsApp_Guidelines.pdf)

These documents outline our organization's structure, policies, and community standards.
